titleCase.description: Chicago title case: capitalize all major words; lowercase articles (a, an, the), short prepositions (in, of, on, for, to, at, by, up), and coordinating conjunctions (and, but, or, nor, yet, so) unless first or last word
titleCase.message: Use Chicago-style title case for H1, H2, and H3 headings

sentenceCase.message: Use sentence case for H4+ headings

noTrailingQuestionMark.message: Headings must not end with a question mark

tableOfContentsLabel.message: Use 'Table of Contents' (title case) as the ToC label

consistency.message: Use consistent bullet markers throughout the document, including the Table of Contents

descriptiveText.message: Consider using descriptive text instead of bare URLs

requireLanguage.message: Consider specifying language for code blocks

noPrompts.message: Remove $ prompt from commands for better copy-paste experience

errorCodePairs.message: Spell out 'and' between HTTP error codes instead of using a slash (e.g. 'HTTP 401 and HTTP 403')

emDashSeparator.message: Use a colon instead of an em dash to separate a term from its description (e.g. '`key`: description')

arrowSeparator.message: Use a colon instead of an arrow to separate a term from its description (e.g. '- term: description')

oxfordComma.message: Use the Oxford comma in lists of three or more items (e.g. 'red, white, and blue')

spellOut.message: Spell out numbers one through ten in prose (e.g. 'three steps', not '3 steps')

useNumerals.message: Use numerals for numbers 11 and above (e.g. '12 files', not 'twelve files')
